/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/ban-ts-comment */ // @ts-ignore `terser` may not be installed export type * as Terser from 'terser' // @ts-ignore `terser` may not be installed import type * as Terser from 'terser' /* eslint-enable @typescript-eslint/ban-ts-comment */ export type TerserMinifyOptions = Terser.MinifyOptions export type TerserMinifyOutput = Terser.MinifyOutput
